creator: jaj@hcl-club.lu
text:
This updates wxD to version 0.10.
It now uses wxGTK 2.8 instead of 2.6.
It doesn't currently build on amd64 because of int conversion errors. I assume this applies to other 64 bit archs too but I can't test it. I will discuss this with the developers.

Have a nice day and keep up the good work!
Regards, Jona

Fix: Following patches in the 'files' subfolder are not needed anymore:
patch-wx-Makefile
patch-wx-pointers
patch-wxc-Makefile
(these fbsd specific patches were merged upstream)
